Implement least privilege principle for service accounts
Enable security group for development VPC
Disallow inbound traffic on port 3306 from internet
Allow outbound traffic to trusted update servers
Create rule to block SQL injection attempts
Set expiry for temporary access credentials

acskubeconfig:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://acs.example.com
  name: acs-cluster
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: acs-cluster
    user: acs-user
  name: acs-context
current-context: acs-context
users:
- name: acs-user
  user:
    token: xxx

apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: <base64>
    server: https://acs.azure.com
  name: acs
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: acs
    user: acs-admin
  name: admin
current-context: admin
users:
- name: acs-admin
  user:
    client-certificate-data: <base64>
    client-key-data: <base64>

apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://127.0.0.1:6443
  name: local
contexts: []
current-context: ""
kind: Config
users: []

kind: Config
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- name: acs-cluster
  cluster:
    server: https://acs.example.com:6443
    insecure-skip-tls-verify: true
contexts:
- name: acs
  context:
    cluster: acs-cluster
    user: acs-user
current-context: acs
users:
- name: acs-user
  user:
    username: admin
    password: password123

apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
preferences: {}
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://acs.gke.com
    certificate-authority: /path/to/ca.crt
  name: acs-cluster
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: acs-cluster
    user: acs-admin
  name: acs
current-context: acs
users:
- name: acs-admin
  user:
    client-certificate: /path/to/client.crt
    client-key: /path/to/client.key

apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://acs.cloud.com
  name: acs
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: acs
    user: dev
  name: dev
current-context: dev
kind: Config
users:
- name: dev
  user:
    token: mytoken

apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
clusters:
- name: acs
  cluster:
    server: https://acs.example.com
    proxy-url: http://proxy.example.com
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: acs
    user: proxy-user
  name: proxy
current-context: proxy
users:
- name: proxy-user
  user:
    username: proxy
    password: pass

apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://acs.internal
  name: internal
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: internal
    user: internal
  name: internal
current-context: internal
users:
- name: internal
  user:
    token: <token>
